ModMetaData.name: Replace Stuff - Performance Edition [BETA]
ModMetaData.author: Kyle Givler
ModMetaData.description:
Performance-optimized fork of the original "Replace Stuff" mod.
This version maintains the core functionality of replacing building materials in-place without deconstructing, but has been modified for higher performance. This mod is currentely under heavy active development. Please report any issues.
I am refactoring, cleaning and modernizing the code for Replace Stuff from the ground up with perfromance in mind.
OPTIMIZATIONS: - Refactored and rebuilt from the ground up with perfromance in mind.
Original mod by Uuugggg. This fork is dedicated to maintaining the functionality of the original while removing the performance tax previously associated with complex base management.
FEATURES: - Replace the stuff a thing is made from in-place (e.g., stone walls to plasteel). - Does not break room temperature or workbench bills. - Blueprints are allowed over rock and fog. - Architect/Structure menu integration for easy material swapping.
SOURCE CODE: - Source Code: https://github.com/JoyfulReaper/RimWorld-ReplaceStuff
CREDITS AND CONTRIBUTIONS: - Original mod by Uuugggg. - Includes performance optimizations originally identified by Hexnet111 (https://github.com/MemeGoddess/RimWorld-ReplaceStuff/pull/10).
